TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr-frogstory_angai
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: miana 'una kaan tacin manu ah Pori kaan ah nganaiin.
S.PHON: miana ʔuna kaan taʦin manu ah por~ɾi kaan ah ŋanaiin.
S.FORM: miana 'una kaan tacin manu ah Pori kaan ah nganaiin.
S.PHON: miana ʔuna kaan taʦin manu ah por~ɾi kaan ah ŋanaiin.
S.TRANSL: 從前,有一個小孩,名字是Pori.
In the past, there was a kid named Pori.

S.FORM: uh 'una nipapacʉvʉrʉkee takarura mataa 'una tamtitu.
S.PHON: uh ʔuna nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨkee takar~ɾur~ɾa mataa ʔuna tamtitu.
S.FORM: uh 'una nipapacʉvʉrʉkee takarura mataa 'una tamtitu.
S.PHON: uh ʔuna nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨkee takar~ɾur~ɾa mataa ʔuna tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 養了青蛙和小狗.

TRANSL.notes: (he) kept a frog and a puppy.

S.TRANSL: kept a frog and a puppy.

W.TRANSL: 過去-重疊-使役-生長=3SG.屬格

S.FORM: eh cʉ'ʉrʉʉnkee sua uh nipapacʉvʉrʉkee sua takarura.
S.PHON: eh ʦɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨnkee sua uh nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨkee sua takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: eh cʉ'ʉrʉʉnkee sua uh nipapacʉvʉrʉkee sua takarura.
S.PHON: eh ʦɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨnkee sua uh nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨkee sua takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 看到所飼養的青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw the frog he kept.

S.TRANSL: saw the frog he kept.

W.TRANSL: 過去-重複-使役-生長=3SG.屬格

S.FORM: 'esi nia kangvang sua ta ʉncoo tamtitu 'esi porun.
S.PHON: ʔesi nia kaŋvaŋ sua ta ɨnʦoo tamtitu ʔesi por~ɾun.
S.FORM: 'esi nia kangvang sua ta ʉncoo tamtitu 'esi porun.
S.PHON: ʔesi nia kaŋvaŋ sua ta ɨnʦoo tamtitu ʔesi por~ɾun.
S.TRANSL: 小狗都在那邊一直叫.
The puppy was barking there.

S.FORM: makasuacu ʉ 'esicu masarunpʉ sin'icʉpʉ na tatarʉ sua mamanu.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ɨ ʔesiʦu masar~ɾunpɨ sinʔiʦɨpɨ na tatar~ɾɨ sua mamanu.
S.FORM: makasuacu ʉ 'esicu masarunpʉ sin'icʉpʉ na tatarʉ sua mamanu.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ɨ ʔesiʦu masar~ɾunpɨ sinʔiʦɨpɨ na tatar~ɾɨ sua mamanu.
S.TRANSL: 之後,小孩覺得睏了,在床上睡覺.
Afterwards, the kids had felt sleepy and slept in the bed.

S.FORM: sua Pori kisʉʉn mataa nguain tamna tamtitu arakukun si'icʉpʉ.
S.PHON: sua por~ɾi kisɨɨn mataa ŋuain tamna tamtitu ar~ɾakukun siʔiʦɨpɨ.
S.FORM: sua Pori kisʉʉn mataa nguain tamna tamtitu arakukun si'icʉpʉ.
S.PHON: sua por~ɾi kisɨɨn mataa ŋuain tamna tamtitu ar~ɾakukun siʔiʦɨpɨ.
S.TRANSL: Pori和她的小狗一起睡覺.
Pori and his puppy slept together.

S.FORM: mesua ia sua kavangvang nguain tamna tikuru mataa nguain tamna carapung sua nipapacʉvʉrʉkee.
S.PHON: mesua ia sua kavaŋvaŋ ŋuain tamna tikur~ɾu mataa ŋuain tamna ʦar~ɾapuŋ sua nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨkee.
S.FORM: mesua ia sua kavangvang nguain tamna tikuru mataa nguain tamna carapung sua nipapacʉvʉrʉkee.
S.PHON: mesua ia sua kavaŋvaŋ ŋuain tamna tikur~ɾu mataa ŋuain tamna ʦar~ɾapuŋ sua nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨkee.
S.TRANSL: 當時,他的所有衣服、帽子和所養的
Then, all his clothes, hat, and what he fed…

W.TRANSL: 完成-重疊-使役-生長=3SG.屬格

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo takaruru ia 'esi tisikara na pupunga pania.
S.PHON: sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾu ia ʔesi tisikar~ɾa na pupuŋa pania.
S.FORM: sua ʉncoo takaruru ia 'esi tisikara na pupunga pania.
S.PHON: sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾu ia ʔesi tisikar~ɾa na pupuŋa pania.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙在竹製的瓶子裡面.
The frog was in the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: ʉ sh acuu si si'icʉpʉ 'aan tavarʉ'ʉ sua ʉncoo takarura ia 'eseva niarapapining tia manguru.
S.PHON: ɨ sh aʦuu si siʔiʦɨpɨ ʔaan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾa ia ʔeseva niar~ɾapapiniŋ tia maŋur~ɾu.
S.FORM: ʉ sh acuu si si'icʉpʉ 'aan tavarʉ'ʉ sua ʉncoo takarura ia 'eseva niarapapining tia manguru.
S.PHON: ɨ sh aʦuu si siʔiʦɨpɨ ʔaan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾa ia ʔeseva niar~ɾapapiniŋ tia maŋur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,在睡覺,不知道青蛙要逃到外面.

TRANSL.notes: Well, (he) was sleeping, not knowing the frog was going to escape to outside.

S.TRANSL: Well, was sleeping, not knowing the frog was going to escape to outside.

S.FORM: ʉ mee aratakarʉ nguain cʉmʉ'ʉra sua ʉncoo takarura na 'esi ni na ʉncoo pania.
S.PHON: ɨ mee ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ ŋuain ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾa na ʔesi ni na ɨnʦoo pania.
S.FORM: ʉ mee aratakarʉ nguain cʉmʉ'ʉra sua ʉncoo takarura na 'esi ni na ʉncoo pania.
S.PHON: ɨ mee ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ ŋuain ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾa na ʔesi ni na ɨnʦoo pania.
S.TRANSL: 當他起來時,看到青蛙在瓶子裏面.
When he stood up, he saw the frog was in the bottle.

S.FORM: ʉ pupunga ia misen 'akiacu nimanguru.
S.PHON: ɨ pupuŋa ia misen ʔakiaʦu nimaŋur~ɾu.
S.FORM: ʉ pupunga ia misen 'akiacu nimanguru.
S.PHON: ɨ pupuŋa ia misen ʔakiaʦu nimaŋur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 為什麼(青蛙)不在瓶子裡?(青蛙)跑掉了.

S.TRANSL: 為什麼 不在瓶子裡? 跑掉了.

TRANSL.notes: Why wasn't it (frog) in the bottle? (It) escaped.

S.TRANSL: Why wasn't it in the bottle? escaped.

S.FORM: imova sua nguain tamna tamtitu 'esi hm porun.
S.PHON: imova sua ŋuain tamna tamtitu ʔesi hm por~ɾun.
S.FORM: imova sua nguain tamna tamtitu 'esi hm porun.
S.PHON: imova sua ŋuain tamna tamtitu ʔesi hm por~ɾun.
S.TRANSL: 所以他的小狗吠叫.
Therefore, his puppy barked.

S.FORM: makasuacu ah aratakarʉ nguani nguain sua ʉncoo ma manu isi ma manu isi makacarapung.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ah ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ ŋuani ŋuain sua ɨnʦoo ma manu isi ma manu isi makaʦar~ɾapuŋ.
S.FORM: makasuacu ah aratakarʉ nguani nguain sua ʉncoo ma manu isi ma manu isi makacarapung.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ah ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ ŋuani ŋuain sua ɨnʦoo ma manu isi ma manu isi makaʦar~ɾapuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 之後,這小孩他起來帶戴帽子.
Afterwards, this kid, he stood up and put on the hat.

S.FORM: mataa tiki tikirimkee na ʉncoo sapuarʉ.
S.PHON: mataa tiki tikir~ɾimkee na ɨnʦoo sapuar~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: mataa tiki tikirimkee na ʉncoo sapuarʉ.
S.PHON: mataa tiki tikir~ɾimkee na ɨnʦoo sapuar~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 然後,找網子.

TRANSL.notes: Then, (he) looked for a net.

S.TRANSL: Then, looked for a net.

S.FORM: 'esikara nimitʉvʉng 'inia sua.
S.PHON: ʔesikar~ɾa nimitɨvɨŋ ʔinia sua.
S.FORM: 'esikara nimitʉvʉng 'inia sua.
S.PHON: ʔesikar~ɾa nimitɨvɨŋ ʔinia sua.
S.TRANSL: 他躲在那邊嗎?
Did it hide there?

S.FORM: ʉ takaruru akiava.
S.PHON: ɨ takar~ɾur~ɾu akiava.
S.FORM: ʉ takaruru akiava.
S.PHON: ɨ takar~ɾur~ɾu akiava.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙竟然不見了!
The frog should be gone!

S.FORM: makasua sua ʉncoo nguain tamna tamtitu ia 'esi arisovuunkee sua pania ʉ pupunga.
S.PHON: makasua sua ɨnʦoo ŋuain tamna tamtitu ia ʔesi ar~ɾisovuunkee sua pania ɨ pupuŋa.
S.FORM: makasua sua ʉncoo nguain tamna tamtitu ia 'esi arisovuunkee sua pania ʉ pupunga.
S.PHON: makasua sua ɨnʦoo ŋuain tamna tamtitu ia ʔesi ar~ɾisovuunkee sua pania ɨ pupuŋa.
S.TRANSL: 之後,他的小狗聞竹製的瓶子.
Afterwards, his dog smelt the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: 'esikara tisikara 'inia?
S.PHON: ʔesikar~ɾa tisikar~ɾa ʔinia?
S.FORM: 'esikara tisikara 'inia?
S.PHON: ʔesikar~ɾa tisikar~ɾa ʔinia?
S.TRANSL: 有在裡面嗎?
Was it inside there?

S.FORM: ʉ na ʉncoo tapcara sinʉva.
S.PHON: ɨ na ɨnʦoo tapʦar~ɾa sinɨva.
S.FORM: ʉ na ʉncoo tapcara sinʉva.
S.PHON: ɨ na ɨnʦoo tapʦar~ɾa sinɨva.
S.TRANSL: 在門的上面.

TRANSL.notes: (It's) above the door.

S.TRANSL: above the door.

S.FORM: tarakusa pipining ʉ cumacʉ'ʉra tikirim.
S.PHON: tar~ɾakusa pipiniŋ ɨ ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa tikir~ɾim.
S.FORM: tarakusa pipining ʉ cumacʉ'ʉra tikirim.
S.PHON: tar~ɾakusa pipiniŋ ɨ ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa tikir~ɾim.

TRANSL.notes: (狗)向外面看,尋找(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 向外面看,尋找 .

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) looked toward outside, looking for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: looked toward outside, looking for .

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo nguain tamna tamtitu ia ha'au koo 'aan tavarʉ'ʉ 'esi na navungin sua ʉncoo ʉ pupunga ah pania.
S.PHON: sua ɨnʦoo ŋuain tamna tamtitu ia haʔau koo ʔaan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔesi na navuŋin sua ɨnʦoo ɨ pupuŋa ah pania.
S.FORM: sua ʉncoo nguain tamna tamtitu ia ha'au koo 'aan tavarʉ'ʉ 'esi na navungin sua ʉncoo ʉ pupunga ah pania.
S.PHON: sua ɨnʦoo ŋuain tamna tamtitu ia haʔau koo ʔaan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔesi na navuŋin sua ɨnʦoo ɨ pupuŋa ah pania.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗不知道他的頭在竹製的瓶子裡.
His dog didn't know his head was in the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: makasuacu nimatapari'i na aranai na tapcaraa sinʉva makasi na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai matapari'i ʉ manasʉ musukom.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu nimatapar~ɾiʔi na ar~ɾanai na tapʦar~ɾaa sinɨva makasi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai matapar~ɾiʔi ɨ manasɨ musukom.
S.FORM: makasuacu nimatapari'i na aranai na tapcaraa sinʉva makasi na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai matapari'i ʉ manasʉ musukom.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu nimatapar~ɾiʔi na ar~ɾanai na tapʦar~ɾaa sinɨva makasi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai matapar~ɾiʔi ɨ manasɨ musukom.

TRANSL.notes: (狗)從門的上面掉到地上,可能很痛.

S.TRANSL: 從門的上面掉到地上,可能很痛.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) fell from the door to the ground. It perhaps got hurt.

S.TRANSL: fell from the door to the ground. It perhaps got hurt.

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo manu Pori kisʉʉn nia nerikee sua nguain tamna tacau.
S.PHON: sua ɨnʦoo manu por~ɾi kisɨɨn nia ner~ɾikee sua ŋuain tamna taʦau.
S.FORM: sua ʉncoo manu Pori kisʉʉn nia nerikee sua nguain tamna tacau.
S.PHON: sua ɨnʦoo manu por~ɾi kisɨɨn nia ner~ɾikee sua ŋuain tamna taʦau.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那個叫Pori的小孩把他的狗拴住.
Then, the kid called Pori fastened his dog.

S.FORM: ʉ maris marisari eh sii manasʉ musukom.
S.PHON: ɨ mar~ɾis mar~ɾisar~ɾi eh sii manasɨ musukom.
S.FORM: ʉ maris marisari eh sii manasʉ musukom.
S.PHON: ɨ mar~ɾis mar~ɾisar~ɾi eh sii manasɨ musukom.

TRANSL.notes: (狗)可能因為痛而叫.

S.TRANSL: 可能因為痛而叫.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) barked perhaps because it hurt.

S.TRANSL: barked perhaps because it hurt.

S.FORM: acuu nim uh niarapurupuru sua ʉncoo pania pupunga.
S.PHON: aʦuu nim uh niar~ɾapur~ɾupur~ɾu sua ɨnʦoo pania pupuŋa.
S.FORM: acuu nim uh niarapurupuru sua ʉncoo pania pupunga.
S.PHON: aʦuu nim uh niar~ɾapur~ɾupur~ɾu sua ɨnʦoo pania pupuŋa.

TRANSL.notes: (狗)打破了竹製的瓶子.

S.TRANSL: 打破了竹製的瓶子.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) broke the bamboo bottle.

S.TRANSL: broke the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: eh makasuacu acuu pipining tarakusa ʉncoo na aracen.
S.PHON: eh makasuaʦu aʦuu pipiniŋ tar~ɾakusa ɨnʦoo na ar~ɾaʦen.
S.FORM: eh makasuacu acuu pipining tarakusa ʉncoo na aracen.
S.PHON: eh makasuaʦu aʦuu pipiniŋ tar~ɾakusa ɨnʦoo na ar~ɾaʦen.

TRANSL.notes: 之後,(狗)到外面望向遠方.

S.TRANSL: 之後, 到外面望向遠方.

TRANSL.notes: Afterwards, (the dog) went outside, looking far away.

S.TRANSL: Afterwards, went outside, looking far away.

S.FORM: tikikirim sua nguain tamna ʉ nipapacʉvʉra takarura.
S.PHON: tikikir~ɾim sua ŋuain tamna ɨ nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾa takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: tikikirim sua nguain tamna ʉ nipapacʉvʉra takarura.
S.PHON: tikikir~ɾim sua ŋuain tamna ɨ nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾa takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 他一直尋找他養的青蛙.
He kept looking for the frog he kept.

W.TRANSL: 完成-重疊-使役-生長.關係詞

S.FORM: 'akia ah koo ʉtʉ ʉteekee sua takarura.
S.PHON: ʔakia ah koo ɨtɨ ɨteekee sua takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: 'akia ah koo ʉtʉ ʉteekee sua takarura.
S.PHON: ʔakia ah koo ɨtɨ ɨteekee sua takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 他沒有找到青蛙.
He didn't find the frog.

S.FORM: uh tarakusa sua tacau na ʉncoo kakangca.
S.PHON: uh tar~ɾakusa sua taʦau na ɨnʦoo kakaŋʦa.
S.FORM: uh tarakusa sua tacau na ʉncoo kakangca.
S.PHON: uh tar~ɾakusa sua taʦau na ɨnʦoo kakaŋʦa.
S.TRANSL: 狗望向天空.
The dog looked at the sky.

S.FORM: kacaua sua ʉncoo ucucu 'esi minganingani.
S.PHON: kaʦaua sua ɨnʦoo uʦuʦu ʔesi miŋaniŋani.
S.FORM: kacaua sua ʉncoo ucucu 'esi minganingani.
S.PHON: kaʦaua sua ɨnʦoo uʦuʦu ʔesi miŋaniŋani.
S.TRANSL: 很多虎頭蜂一直飛.
Many hornets were flying.

S.FORM: uh makasuacu uh tarakusa na ʉncoo uh karu tatia 'una sua tarako 'inia.
S.PHON: uh makasuaʦu uh tar~ɾakusa na ɨnʦoo uh kar~ɾu tatia ʔuna sua tar~ɾako ʔinia.
S.FORM: uh makasuacu uh tarakusa na ʉncoo uh karu tatia 'una sua tarako 'inia.
S.PHON: uh makasuaʦu uh tar~ɾakusa na ɨnʦoo uh kar~ɾu tatia ʔuna sua tar~ɾako ʔinia.

TRANSL.notes: 之後,(小孩)望向大樹,那邊有洞.

S.TRANSL: 之後, 望向大樹,那邊有洞.

TRANSL.notes: Then, (The kid) looked to the big tree. There was a hole.

S.TRANSL: Then, looked to the big tree. There was a hole.

S.FORM: uh mokusacu na nguain se na ʉncoo karu tatia eh mopara ah tarakusa na ʉncoo tarako karu.
S.PHON: uh mokusaʦu na ŋuain se na ɨnʦoo kar~ɾu tatia eh mopar~ɾa ah tar~ɾakusa na ɨnʦoo tar~ɾako kar~ɾu.
S.FORM: uh mokusacu na nguain se na ʉncoo karu tatia eh mopara ah tarakusa na ʉncoo tarako karu.
S.PHON: uh mokusaʦu na ŋuain se na ɨnʦoo kar~ɾu tatia eh mopar~ɾa ah tar~ɾakusa na ɨnʦoo tar~ɾako kar~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 他走去大樹,爬上去看樹洞.
He went to the big tree and climbed up to see the hole.

S.FORM: 'esikara nia sua cʉpʉngʉin ia 'esikara nia sua ʉ takarura XXXX mitʉvʉʉng.
S.PHON: ʔesikar~ɾa nia sua ʦɨpɨŋɨin ia ʔesikar~ɾa nia sua ɨ takar~ɾur~ɾa **** mitɨvɨɨŋ.
S.FORM: 'esikara nia sua cʉpʉngʉin ia 'esikara nia sua ʉ takarura XXXX mitʉvʉʉng.
S.PHON: ʔesikar~ɾa nia sua ʦɨpɨŋɨin ia ʔesikar~ɾa nia sua ɨ takar~ɾur~ɾa **** mitɨvɨɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他想,青蛙有沒有躲在那邊?
he thought if the frog hid there.

S.FORM: makasuacu ʉ aracapici na ʉ ramisi karu.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ɨ ar~ɾaʦapiʦi na ɨ r~ɾamisi kar~ɾu.
S.FORM: makasuacu ʉ aracapici na ʉ ramisi karu.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ɨ ar~ɾaʦapiʦi na ɨ r~ɾamisi kar~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 然後,靠近樹根.

TRANSL.notes: Then, (he) came closer to the tree roots.

S.TRANSL: Then, came closer to the tree roots.

S.FORM: ah mʉtʉa ucan ucani sua aravang.
S.PHON: ah mɨtɨa uʦan uʦani sua ar~ɾavaŋ.
S.FORM: ah mʉtʉa ucan ucani sua aravang.
S.PHON: ah mɨtɨa uʦan uʦani sua ar~ɾavaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 啊!(他)找到一個在裡面.

S.TRANSL: 啊! 找到一個在裡面.

TRANSL.notes: Ah! (he) found one inside.

S.TRANSL: Ah! found one inside.

S.FORM: eh tarakusa nia sua manu cumacʉ'ʉra 'esikara nia 'esikara tisikara nia sua ʉncoo takarura ʉ XXXX mitʉvʉʉng.
S.PHON: eh tar~ɾakusa nia sua manu ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa ʔesikar~ɾa nia ʔesikar~ɾa tisikar~ɾa nia sua ɨnʦoo takar~ɾur~ɾa ɨ **** mitɨvɨɨŋ.
